name: capacity-peak-windows-24h
description: Per-30s-window CU% over the last 24h, highest first — find the peak windows.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1d)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), win = tostring(data.windowStartTime)
| where base > 0
| summarize cuPct = max(100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)) by win
| top 50 by cuPct desc

name: capacity-peak-windows-7d
description: Per-30s-window CU% over the last 7d, highest first — a wider peak-hunting sweep.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(7d)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), win = tostring(data.windowStartTime)
| where base > 0
| summarize cuPct = max(100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)) by win
| top 50 by cuPct desc

name: capacity-cu-pct-trend-hourly-24h
description: Average CU% bucketed hourly over the last 24h, in chronological order — the shape of the day.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1d)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), win = todatetime(data.windowStartTime)
| where base > 0
| summarize avgCuPct = avg(100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)) by bin(win, 1h)
| sort by win asc

name: capacity-throttle-candidates-24h
description: Windows in the last 24h where CU% reached or exceeded 100 — throttle/overload candidates.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1d)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), win = tostring(data.windowStartTime), cap = tostring(data.capacityId)
| where base > 0
| extend cuPct = 100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)
| where cuPct >= 100
| project cap, win, cuPct
| top 50 by cuPct desc

name: capacity-avg-cu-pct-by-capacity-7d
description: Average CU% per capacityId over the last 7d, highest first — which capacity runs hottest.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(7d)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), cap = tostring(data.capacityId)
| where base > 0
| summarize avgCuPct = avg(100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)), windows = count() by cap
| top 50 by avgCuPct desc

name: capacity-window-count-24h
description: Row count of capacity windows ingested per capacityId in the last 24h — sanity check for telemetry coverage.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1d)
| summarize windowCount = count() by cap = tostring(data.capacityId)
| top 50 by windowCount desc

name: capacity-latest-windows-1h
description: Most recent capacity windows in the last hour, newest first, with CU% — a live tail.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1h)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), win = tostring(data.windowStartTime), cap = tostring(data.capacityId)
| where base > 0
| extend cuPct = 100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)
| project cap, win, cuPct
| top 50 by win desc

name: capacity-min-max-cu-pct-7d
description: Min/avg/max CU% per capacityId over the last 7d — the volatility range for each capacity.
kql:
CapacityEvents
| where ingestion_time() > ago(7d)
| extend base = tolong(data.baseCapacityUnits), used = tolong(data.capacityUnitMs), cap = tostring(data.capacityId)
| where base > 0
| extend cuPct = 100.0 * used / (base * 1000 * 30)
| summarize minCuPct = min(cuPct), maxCuPct = max(cuPct), avgCuPct = avg(cuPct) by cap
| top 50 by maxCuPct desc

name: top-users-by-cpu-24h
description: Top ExecutingUsers by total CpuTimeMs over the last 24h.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where isnotempty(ExecutingUser)
| summarize totalCpuMs = sum(CpuTimeMs), ops = count() by ExecutingUser
| top 20 by totalCpuMs desc

name: slow-queries-over-10s
description: Interactive queries whose CpuTimeMs exceeded 10s, newest first, with the query text.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where OperationName == 'QueryEnd'
| where CpuTimeMs > 10000
| project TimeGenerated, ExecutingUser, ArtifactName, CpuTimeMs, DurationMs, EventText
| top 50 by CpuTimeMs desc

name: refresh-operations-by-hour
description: Refresh/command operation counts bucketed hourly over the last 3 days.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(3d)
| where OperationName in ('CommandEnd', 'ProgressReportEnd')
| summarize refreshes = count() by ArtifactName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| top 100 by refreshes desc

name: top-items-by-cpu-24h
description: Top ArtifactNames (items) by total CpuTimeMs over the last 24h.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where isnotempty(ArtifactName)
| summarize totalCpuMs = sum(CpuTimeMs), ops = count() by ArtifactName
| top 20 by totalCpuMs desc

name: top-items-by-refresh-duration-24h
description: Top ArtifactNames (items) by total refresh DurationMs over the last 24h.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where OperationName in ('CommandEnd', 'ProgressReportEnd')
| summarize totalDurationMs = sum(DurationMs), refreshes = count() by ArtifactName
| top 20 by totalDurationMs desc

name: queries-by-operation-type-24h
description: Operation counts by OperationName over the last 24h — the query/refresh/command mix.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| summarize ops = count() by OperationName
| top 20 by ops desc

name: per-workspace-cpu-24h
description: Top PowerBIWorkspaceName by total CpuTimeMs over the last 24h.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where isnotempty(PowerBIWorkspaceName)
| summarize totalCpuMs = sum(CpuTimeMs), ops = count() by PowerBIWorkspaceName
| top 20 by totalCpuMs desc

name: long-running-refreshes-over-60s
description: Refresh/command operations whose DurationMs exceeded 60s over the last 24h, slowest first.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where OperationName in ('CommandEnd', 'ProgressReportEnd')
| where DurationMs > 60000
| project TimeGenerated, ArtifactName, PowerBIWorkspaceName, DurationMs
| top 50 by DurationMs desc

name: user-query-count-24h
description: Interactive query counts (QueryEnd) per ExecutingUser over the last 24h, highest first.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where OperationName == 'QueryEnd'
| where isnotempty(ExecutingUser)
| summarize queries = count() by ExecutingUser
| top 20 by queries desc

name: recent-events-sample-1h
description: A raw sample of the newest events in the last hour — ground before querying more heavily.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| project TimeGenerated, ExecutingUser, ArtifactName, OperationName, CpuTimeMs, DurationMs
| top 20 by TimeGenerated desc
groundedIn: collector_events_la project columns; mirrors sample_events_handler's grounding query

name: queries-with-query-text-sample-24h
description: Interactive queries with non-empty EventText (DAX/query text), costliest first — sample real query text.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where OperationName == 'QueryEnd'
| where isnotempty(EventText)
| project TimeGenerated, ExecutingUser, ArtifactName, CpuTimeMs, EventText
| top 20 by CpuTimeMs desc

name: per-user-per-item-cpu-7d
description: Total CpuTimeMs per (ExecutingUser, ArtifactName) pair over the last 7d — who is driving cost on which item.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(ExecutingUser) and isnotempty(ArtifactName)
| summarize totalCpuMs = sum(CpuTimeMs), ops = count() by ExecutingUser, ArtifactName
| top 50 by totalCpuMs desc

name: workspace-activity-trend-hourly-3d
description: Operation counts bucketed hourly over the last 3 days, in chronological order — the estate's activity shape.
kql:
PowerBIDatasetsWorkspace
| where TimeGenerated > ago(3d)
| summarize ops = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
